title: Marketplace Manager - Swiggy Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Swiggy Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Swiggy Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Swiggy Global Group:
Swiggy Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Global Group!
